## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx @cobusgreyling/loop-audit .` score remains ≥70
- [ ] No denylist paths modified
- [ ] Human gate rules from `docs/safety.md` respected
- [ ] `loop-run-log.md` updated if the loop behavior changed

## Risk level

- [ ] Low (docs, logging, tests)
- [ ] Medium (new signal/harvester behavior)
- [ ] High (threshold changes, auto-harvest, publish logic)
